subcodes.first_line: O servant of the sacred Threshold of God! Call to mind those days thou didst pass at the Court of the True One, honored by the privilege of service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس الهی یاد آر ایامیرا در درگاه حق گذراندی و بشرف خدمت مشرف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort
